hero.title: Education & School-Enterprise Cooperation
hero.subtitle: Longxiang connects industry resources, engineering practice, and research collaboration to cultivate high-quality electrical and new energy talent.

sections.title: Co-built Industrial College
sections.summary: In 2016, Longxiang and Henan Mechanical and Electrical Vocational College co-built Longxiang Electrical Engineering College as a model platform for deep industry-education integration.
body: The cooperation focuses on power system automation, electrical automation, power supply technology, distributed generation, and smart microgrid education.
Professional programs are connected with real industry chains, practical engineering projects, and Longxiang's electrical equipment manufacturing base.
The model brings classrooms closer to industrial parks so students can learn through project-based engineering scenarios.

sections.title: Collaborative Talent Training
sections.summary: Longxiang supports a full-cycle training pathway that connects practical training, internship, employment, and professional improvement.
body: The talent training system covers line-field teaching, alternating study and training, on-post internships, and dual-mentor guidance.
Training scenarios extend from power equipment to photovoltaic, wind power, and energy storage applications.

cards.title: Classroom & Project Discussion
cards.text: Coursework combines technical lectures, project review, and engineering case discussion.

cards.title: Field Practical Training
cards.text: Students train in real outdoor electrical scenarios with safety supervision and practical tasks.

cards.title: Dual-Mentor Guidance
cards.text: Enterprise engineers and college teachers work together to improve learning quality and workplace readiness.

sections.title: Training Equipment Development
sections.summary: Longxiang transforms electrical manufacturing experience into teaching equipment, training platforms, and practical learning environments.
body: Training platforms cover electrical control, switchgear, power distribution, testing, and operation scenarios.
The equipment supports hands-on teaching, skills assessment, and integrated teaching-production training.
Practical hardware helps students understand system structure, operation logic, and maintenance workflow.

sections.title: Research & International Cooperation
sections.summary: Longxiang integrates research resources to support technical innovation, industry upgrading, and international education cooperation.
body: The company cooperates with universities and research institutes on smart microgrid, new energy, green charging station, and advanced power equipment topics.
The education platform supports the export of Chinese standards, technical know-how, and equipment experience for international power talent training.
Longxiang continues to explore overseas cooperation models for power and new energy vocational education.

sections.title: Cooperation Philosophy
sections.summary: Industry empowers education, education feeds industry, and innovation drives upgrading.
body: Longxiang aims to deepen industry-education integration and science-education collaboration.
The platform supports talent cultivation and technical innovation for the construction of new power systems.
The long-term goal is to build a power and new energy education platform with domestic leadership and international connectivity.

sections.title: Education Cooperation Gallery
sections.summary: Campus, classroom, field training, factory visit, and cooperation platform moments from Longxiang's education program.

cta.title: Build Your Training Program with Longxiang
cta.text: Contact our education cooperation team for curriculum, training equipment, and joint talent development.
